problem: What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale?
hypothesis: The key to What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale? is Shape memory alloy phase transition — specifically Shape memory alloy — which would help 8,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 33 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
